testcase.name: Tests to verify utils functions Should determine existence of files/folders

testcase.classname: Should get correct relative paths of files/folders

testcase.classname: Should remove $() from sqlcmd variables

testcase.classname: Should determine invalid sqlcmd variable names

testcase.classname: Should convert from milliseconds to hr min sec correctly

testcase.name: Tests to verify utils functions Should correctly detect present commands
testcase.classname: Should correctly detect present commands

testcase.classname: Should not invoke callback when user cancels project selection

testcase.name: Update Project From Database Quickpicks Should use provided project file path without prompting when passed as parameter
testcase.classname: Should use provided project file path without prompting when passed as parameter

testcase.name: Update Project From Database Quickpicks Should prompt for project when no project file path is provided as parameter
testcase.classname: Should prompt for project when no project file path is provided as parameter

testcase.classname: Should throw error when attempting to use templates before loaded from file

testcase.classname: Should correctly order tree nodes by type, then by name

testcase.classname: Should build tree from Project file correctly

testcase.name: ProjectsController project controller operations Project file operations and prompting Should create new sqlproj file with correct specified target platform
testcase.classname: Should create new sqlproj file with correct specified target platform

testcase.name: ProjectsController project controller operations Project file operations and prompting Should return silently when no SQL object name provided in prompts
testcase.classname: Should return silently when no SQL object name provided in prompts

testcase.name: ProjectsController project controller operations Project file operations and prompting Should not create file if no itemTypeName is selected
testcase.classname: Should not create file if no itemTypeName is selected

testcase.name: ProjectsController project controller operations Project file operations and prompting Should parse schema and object name from user input
testcase.classname: Should parse schema and object name from user input

testcase.name: ProjectsController project controller operations Project file operations and prompting Should create .vscode/tasks.json at workspace level with isDefault=true when configureDefaultBuild is true
testcase.classname: Should create .vscode/tasks.json at workspace level with isDefault=true when configureDefaultBuild is true

testcase.name: ProjectsController project controller operations Project file operations and prompting Should merge SQL build task into existing tasks.json when it already exists at workspace level
testcase.classname: Should merge SQL build task into existing tasks.json when it already exists at workspace level

testcase.name: ProjectsController project controller operations Publishing and script generation publishProject should invoke mssql.publishDatabaseProject command with correct project path
testcase.classname: publishProject should invoke mssql.publishDatabaseProject command with correct project path

testsuite.name: Create project from database operations and dialog
